name: Sphere Entertainment Co.
business: Sphere Entertainment Co. operates two segments: Sphere, an experiential medium offering immersive productions, concerts, and brand events at its Las Vegas venue, and MSG Networks, which provides regional sports and entertainment content through linear networks and a direct-to-consumer streaming service.
sellsTo: artists and promoters for live events

exposures.sentence: The Company is a leader in immersive experiences, technology and media and is comprised of two reportable segments, Sphere and MSG Networks.

The Wizard of Oz at Sphere is a fully immersive experience that uses all of Sphere’s advanced technologies to make audiences feel like they have stepped inside The Wizard of Oz, and showcases Sphere’s storytelling capabilities as an experiential medium; the experience uses technologies, including artificial intelligence and visual effects.

Under the terms of the partnership, the Company receives a franchise initiation fee (a portion of which has been received) in connection with providing DCT Abu Dhabi the right to utilize our proprietary designs, technology, and intellectual property in building the venue; construction will be funded by DCT Abu Dhabi, with our team of experts providing services related to development, construction, and pre-opening of the venue.

catalysts.event: The Wizard of Oz at Sphere debuted
catalysts.sentence: We are currently showing The Wizard of Oz at Sphere, which debuted in August 2025.

catalysts.event: Announced intent to develop Sphere venue at National Harbor, Maryland
catalysts.sentence: In January 2026, the Company, the State of Maryland, Prince George’s County, and Peterson Companies announced the Company’s intent to develop a new Sphere venue at National Harbor, Maryland.
